actions.title: PCB inspection of Narol Industrial Cluster
actions.description: 55 locations show simultaneous high temperature, bare land, and dry soil — environmental signature of active industrial pollution. Immediate on-site inspection required.
actions.estimated_impact: Prevent further land degradation in 55 flagged locations

actions.title: Emergency tree plantation in South Ahmedabad Residential Zone
actions.description: 4 locations show critically high LST (avg 35.61°C) combined with NDVI below 0.08. Immediate plantation of minimum 120 trees required.
actions.estimated_impact: Could reduce LST by 1.5-2°C in affected zone

actions.title: Soil moisture recharge programme in Low moisture zones
actions.description: 94 locations show soil moisture below 0.146 — the lowest quartile for Ahmedabad. Groundwater recharge pits and rainwater harvesting structures recommended.
actions.estimated_impact: Improve soil moisture and reduce surface heating

actions.title: PCB inspection of Naroda Industrial Cluster
actions.description: 4 locations show simultaneous high temperature, bare land, and dry soil — environmental signature of active industrial pollution. Immediate on-site inspection required.
actions.estimated_impact: Prevent further land degradation in 4 flagged locations

actions.title: Monthly satellite monitoring protocol for vegetation recovery
actions.description: 86.0% of Ahmedabad shows stressed or barren vegetation. A monthly NDVI monitoring protocol using Sentinel-2 data will track recovery after interventions.

actions.title: Cool roof mandate for top hottest ward locations
actions.description: 10 locations with LST above 36.5°C in dense urban areas where tree plantation is not feasible. Cool roof coating mandate recommended for all new constructions.

triggered_by.finding: High LST in dense urban areas

actions.estimated_impact: Reduce indoor temperatures and surface heat
